title: Wild Mushroom Bliss Date Night
description: A floral, crumbly Canadian dish featuring wild mushrooms in a delightful date-night meal that is also fodmap-friendly.

ingredients.name: 2 cups of dried wild mushrooms
ingredients.notes: Soaked in warm water for at least 45 minutes

ingredients.name: 1 cup of chopped fresh herbs (rosemary, thyme, and parsley mix)

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Drain and rinse the soaked mushrooms.

In a large bowl, combine the drained mushrooms with chopped herbs, crumbled goat cheese, onion, garlic, balsamic vinegar, lemon juice, and olive oil. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Transfer the mixture to an oven-safe baking dish. Bake for 30 minutes, or until the mixture is hot and golden on top.
Remove from the oven, let it rest for a few minutes before serving.
